segments.text: Out of the depths I have cried to You, O Lord;
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Lord, hear my voice! Let Your ears be attentive To the voice of my supplications.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: If You, Lord, should mark iniquities, O Lord, who could stand?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But there is forgiveness with You,
I wait for the Lord, my soul waits, And in His word I do hope.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: My soul waits for the Lord More than those who watch for the morning— Yes, more than those who watch for the morning.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: O Israel, hope in the Lord; For with the Lord there is mercy, And with Him is abundant redemption.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: And He shall redeem Israel From all his iniquities.
segments.speaker: God
